{{Quote|Understand, please, as Caretaker of the Tower of First Knowledge, my responsibilities include all of the old lore.|Astaal Vilbum to Mace Windu|<ref name="SWRD" />}}
'''Astaal Vilbum''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Baragwin/Legends|Baragwin]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Consular|Consular]] and the [[Caretaker of First Knowledge/Legends|Caretaker of First Knowledge]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Astaal Vilbum was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Baragwin/Legends|Baragwin]] and a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Over [[Time/Legends|time]], Vilbum became a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Vilbum was later appointed to the role of [[Caretaker of First Knowledge/Legends|Caretaker of First Knowledge]], the only permanent seat on the [[Council of First Knowledge/Legends|Council of First Knowledge]]. As the leader of the five-member body, Vilbum presided over the [[Holocron Chamber]] within the [[Tower of First Knowledge/Legends|southeast tower]] of the Temple and was one of the few Masters allowed to enter the [[Holocron Vault/Legends|Holocron Vaults]] of the [[Jedi Archives/Legends|Jedi Archives]].<ref name="TCWCG">''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

In [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]], Vilbum presided over the activation of the [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] of [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Volfe Karkko]], an event which had not occurred over the life-spans of the past thirteen Caretakers. Summoning [[Jedi High Council/Legends|High Council]] member and [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] to the Holocron Chamber, Vilbum informed Windu of the details of the holocron and its potential ramifications toward [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], who was undertaking a [[Mission to Kiffex|mission]] to [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]]. Because Karkko was imprisoned on Kiffex, Vilbum feared that the young Knight would be ill-prepared to face the horrors that awaited him. Windu disagreed, however, stating his faith in Vos and the other Jedi that would assist him.<ref name="SWRD" />
